main.description: A consent record expressing explicit agreement by a DID holder to specific terms, policies, or conditions tied to a subject resource.

subject.description: AT-URI of the resource this consent applies to (e.g. a listing, purchase, or service).

terms.description: URI pointing to the human-readable terms or policy being consented to.

termsVersion.description: Version identifier of the terms document at time of consent.

scope.description: Explicit list of permissions or actions being consented to.

expiresAt.description: Optional timestamp after which this consent is no longer valid.

revokedAt.description: Timestamp of revocation, if consent has been withdrawn.

proofRef.description: Optional reference to the at.ofwork.proof record that verifies this consent was genuinely granted.
